description: The Set Global Rotation node sets the input slot's rotation to the provided floatQ value in global coordinate space.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Sets the Instance slot's global roation when an impulse is received.
fields.Instance: The slot whose global rotation is set. Default is null, the node does not function without this input.
fields.Rotation: The global rotation the input Instance slot is set to. Default is [0;0;0].
fields.Next: An impulse is fired whenever the Instance slot's rotation is set after the node receives an impulse. No impulse is fired from this output if the Instance input is null.
